mapper.select:
/* UsimOrdMngMapper.usimOrdMdlList */ SELECT A.ORD_ID , A.SEQ , A.RPRS_PRDT_ID , B.PRDT_CODE , B.PRDT_NM , A.ORD_CNT , B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC , A.ORD_CNT * B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC AS AMT , A.ORD_CNT * B.OUT_UNIT_PRIC * 1.1 AS AMT_VAT , A.DEL_YN
FROM MSP_M2M_ORD_MDL A ,MSP_M2M_MDL B WHERE A.ORD_ID = #{ordId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.RPRS_PRDT_ID ORDER BY A.SEQ

/* UsimOrdMngMapper.getOrgIdComboList */ SELECT DISTINCT ORG_ID AS VALUE , ORG_NM AS TEXT FROM MDS_AGNT_INFO BB WHERE BB.CONT_MCTG_CRCLT_CH_CD = 'E0200' /* 계약채널(중) - 특수*/ AND BB.CONT_CRCLT_CH_CD = 'E0211' /* 계약채널(소) - 특판(B2B)*/ ORDER BY 1

/* UsimOrdMngMapper.getOrgIdComboList */ SELECT DISTINCT B.ORGN_ID AS VALUE , C.ORGN_NM AS TEXT FROM CMN_USG_GRP_ASGN_MST a , CMN_USR_MST b , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C WHERE a.USR_ID = b.USR_ID (+) AND B.ORGN_ID = C.ORGN_ID (+) AND B.USG_YN <> 'N' AND a.GRP_ID = 'G-PSCM2M' ORDER BY C.ORGN_NM

/* UsimOrdMngMapper.getM2mAddr */ SELECT SEQ , ORGN_ID , AREA_NM , MNG_NM , TEL_FN1 , TEL_MN1 , TEL_RN1 , TEL_FN2 , TEL_MN2 , TEL_RN2 , USE_YN , POST , ADDR , ADDR_BJD , ADDR_DTL FROM MSP_M2M_ADDR WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

/* UsimOrdMngMapper.getM2mMdl */ SELECT RPRS_PRDT_ID , PRDT_CODE , PRDT_NM , PRDT_DESC , OUT_UNIT_PRIC , USE_YN , UNIT_PRIC_APPL_DTTM , UNIT_PRIC_EXPR_DTTM , IMG_FILE , ORG_IMG_FILE , B.ATT_ROUT /* 파일경로 */ , B.FILE_NM /* 파일명 */ FROM MSP_M2M_MDL A LEFT OUTER JOIN ORG_FILE_MGMT_MST B ON ATT_SCTN = 'M2M' AND RPRS_PRDT_ID = B.ORGN_ID WHERE RPRS_PRDT_ID = #{rprsPrdtId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT /* CmnCdMgmtMapper.getCommCombo */ GCM.CD_VAL AS value /* 코드 값 */ , GCM.CD_DSC AS text /* 코드 내용 */ FROM CMN_GRP_MST CGM , CMN_GRP_CD_MST GCM WHERE 1 = 1 AND CGM.GRP_ID = GCM.GRP_ID AND CGM.GRP_ID = 'LGS0002' AND GCM.USG_YN = 'Y' AND GCM.CD_VAL IN ('DLV01','DLV02') ORDER BY GCM.CD_VAL ASC

SELECT /* CmnCdMgmtMapper.getTbNm */ GCM.CD_VAL AS value /* 코드 값 */ , GCM.CD_DSC AS text /* 코드 내용 */ FROM CMN_GRP_MST CGM , CMN_GRP_CD_MST GCM WHERE 1 = 1 AND CGM.GRP_ID = GCM.GRP_ID AND CGM.GRP_ID = 'RCP0025' AND GCM.CD_VAL = #{tbCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND GCM.USG_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY GCM.CD_VAL ASC
